case_title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. VS. MIKE LOFTUS ET AL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOFTUS, MIKE AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOFTUS, MIKE AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 677 ELLIS STREET, UNIT NUMBER 12B, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCSICO, CALIFORNIA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**
